creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: In my original patch for bug 258112, a file gets processed with USES=shebangfix properly, but the same file also has a PATCH_SITES/PATCHFILES that obliterates the shebangfix (changes the shebang from python to python3). The .orig shows the shebangfix applied. This probably needs to run during post-patch or similar.
